content.en:
"The control of knowledge in the Xuanqi Realm is really too strict!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, if you think about it carefully, it is normal that the cultivation of high-level immeasurable life forms is also explored step by step, and those top forces naturally do not want to pass on this precious knowledge.

The knowledge that can be passed on is not very precious and cannot be limited, so it will be sold.

And if the first stage of the high-level immeasurable lifeform atavistic stage wants to transform the high-level lifeform energy body into a flesh and blood body, if you rely on your own slow cultivation, the speed is too slow, and even if you cultivate from the beginning of the birth of the Xuanqi Realm to the present, you may not be able to complete the complete transformation.

In other words, without the help of external objects, there is no way to reverse the body of energy into flesh and blood.

And there are many substitutes for this foreign object, one of which is Hailou gold.

This is also the reason why the Hurricane Pavilion wants to invade the Void Whale Mountain, where the Void Whale Overlord is located, to snatch the Sea Tower Gold.

After all, the Hurricane Pavilion's high-level immeasurable lifeform cultivation required Hailou Gold, and if they had enough Hailou Gold, they could even condense the Immeasurable Bone and step into the second stage.

And Hailou Heavenly Gold is of great use for condensing immeasurable blood, but a little bit of Hailou Heavenly Gold is not very useful, and a large amount of Hailou Heavenly Gold is needed to help a high-level immeasurable lifeform condense three hundred and sixty-five immeasurable bones to condense a drop of immeasurable blood.

The Void Whale Overlord just wanted to gather enough Hailou Tianjin, so as to completely condense the immeasurable blood and enter the third stage.

It's a pity that he burned his blood last time and injured his foundation, so he can't impact the third stage for the time being.

"All the Hailou Gold in my hand has been fused into Hailou Tianjin. Using Hailou Heavenly Gold to carry out atavistic cultivation and condense flesh and blood, the effect should be better!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, he still lacked Hailou Jin, and last time he had spent a lot of Hailou Tianjin in order to cultivate the Infinite Body to the consummation realm.

Although he still has a lot of Hailou Heavenly Gold in his hand, he will need more Hailou Heavenly Gold to cultivate the Infinite Body to the extreme realm in the future.

After reaching the stage of immeasurable bones, a large amount of Hailou Jin or Hailou Tianjin is required.

And the Hailou Jin on his body now is afraid that it will not be able to support him to condense all the immeasurable bones, and it is estimated that he can only cultivate to the point where he has just stepped into the second stage.

"I've got to find a way to get some sea house gold!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And where is the Hailou Gold, naturally there is no empty galaxy, and there is definitely a lot of Hailou Gold on those overlords.

Even Xumi Whale Mountain should still have a lot of sea building gold, if all of them are snatched up, then he should not be short of sea building gold in a short time.

However.

He can't defeat the Void Whale Overlord, and he can't snatch the Void Whale Overlord's Hailou Gold at all.

And as far as he knew, the Void Whale Overlord was the weaker of the many overlords of the Voidless Galaxy, and the other overlords were also high-level immeasurable lifeforms at the peak of the second stage, and even some of them had condensed immeasurable blood, and their strength was no less than that of the peak of the Bloodless Blood.

If you rob those overlords of the sea building gold, it is definitely looking for death!

After pondering for a long time, Ye Tian suddenly had an idea.

"Maybe there's no need to snatch the sea building gold!"

Ye Tian was going to exchange some Hailou Heavenly Gold for more Hailou Gold, and he believed that many overlords or high-level immeasurable lifeforms were willing to exchange it.

Because Hailou Jin is useless against the second stage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms impacting the third stage, Hailou Tianjin is of great use.

Moreover, the value of Hailou Tianjin is too high, even the Hurricane Pavilion does not have Hailou Tianjin, and the Hurricane Ancestor dreams of getting Hailou Tianjin.

Therefore, if he is willing to take out Hailou Tianjin to trade Hailou Gold, he can definitely exchange it easily.

However, he had to be cautious in choosing the object of his trade, and he could not trade with any high-level immeasurable lifeform.

"Hurricane Pavilion doesn't estimate that there is much sea building gold, and there is no point in trading with them. The best option is to trade with those overlords of the empty galaxy, but only if you qualify to trade with those overlords. Ye Tian said darkly.

Therefore, Ye Tian decided to cultivate for a period of time first, at least to condense his flesh and blood, in that case, his strength should be comparable to the level of the Void Whale Overlord.

When the time comes, he will be qualified to trade with these overlords.

"It's best to keep some Hailou Tianjin first, and all the other Hailou Tianjin will be refined and used to condense flesh and blood!"

Ye Tian decided.

In the following years, Ye Tian practiced like this.

The first stage of cultivation of a high-level immeasurable lifeform is to use Hailou Tianjin or Hailou Jin and other similar substances to combine their own life force to shape flesh and blood.

And the shaping of flesh and blood is best shaped according to one's own immeasurable body, so as to retain the particularity of immeasurable body.

For example, Ye Tian has cultivated the body of Wuji, so he shapes the body of flesh and blood according to the body of Wuji, so that the flesh and blood body after shaping will also have the physique of the body of Wuji.

As pieces of Hailou Heavenly Gold were consumed, Ye Tian's high-level immeasurable life energy body gradually began to flesh and blood, and the speed of flesh and blood was far faster than that of other high-level immeasurable life forms.

After all, he used the substance of Hailou Tianjin, not ordinary Hailou Jin.

Ye Tian also tried to flesh and blood by himself, but found that there was almost no change.

"At least more than a thousand pieces of Hailou Heavenly Gold are needed to make my whole body flesh and blood!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In fact, at least even if a high-level immeasurable lifeform obtained so much Hailou Heavenly Gold, it would not be willing to waste it so much, and it would definitely be used to break through the bottleneck.

In the Xuanqi Realm, there are many treasures that can replace Hailou Jin or Hailou Tianjin, and they will find ways to collect other resources to slowly flesh and blood, and good things like Hailou Jin or Hailou Tianjin will definitely be used at critical moments.

Only Ye Tian is such a tyrant that he will always use Hailou Tianjin to practice.

In the blink of an eye, another million years have passed.

And at this moment, Ye Tian had already refined 1,332 pieces of Hailou Tianjin, and there were not many Hailou Heavenly Gold on his body, and there were only more than 1,000 pieces left!

At this time, Ye Tian's whole body had changed from energy to flesh and blood, and the powerful qi and blood power was enough to crush the ordinary middle-level immeasurable life form.

"The power has increased tenfold! And it's easier to cast the amputated finger, and if you refine it carefully, the power of the severed finger should continue to increase!"

Ye Tian muttered.
